infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeHaven records video evidence during incidents.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeHaven records audio evidence and detects distress sounds.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeHaven tracks your location to share with your trusted contact.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeHaven tracks your location during an active incident.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SafeHaven listens for your safety codeword to start an incident.
